---
title: "Oncology Data Pull"
output: html_document
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
---


```{r data pull}

library(glue)
library(odbc)
library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(pool)

con <- dbPool(drv = odbc::odbc(), dsn = "OAO Cloud DB Production", timeout = 30)
# con <- dbConnect(drv = odbc(), "OAO Cloud DB Staging Oracle", timeout = 30)

drop_query <- glue("DROP TABLE ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE")

date_1 <- "2019-01-01"
date_2 <- Sys.Date() - 1
reg_exp <- "\\[(.*?)\\]"

update_query <- glue("
CREATE TABLE ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE AS
WITH Raw_Patient_Data AS (
    SELECT
        -- Core Patient & Encounter Fields
        a.DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME,
        a.PROV_ID AS EPIC_PROVIDER_ID,
        a.REFERRING_PROV_NAME_WID,
        a.MRN,
        a.PAT_NAME AS Patient_Name,
        a.ZIP_CODE,
        a.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID,
        a.BIRTH_DATE,
        a.FINCLASS AS Coverage,
        a.APPT_MADE_DTTM,
        a.APPT_DTTM,
        a.PRC_NAME AS APPT_TYPE,
        a.APPT_LENGTH AS APPT_DUR,
        a.DERIVED_STATUS_DESC AS APPT_STATUS,
        a.APPT_CANC_DTTM,
        a.CANCEL_REASON_NAME AS CANCEL_REASON,
        a.SIGNIN_DTTM,
        a.PAGED_DTTM,
        a.CHECKIN_DTTM,
        a.ARVL_LIST_REMOVE_DTTM AS ARRIVAL_REMOVE_DTTM,
        a.ROOMED_DTTM,
        a.FIRST_ROOM_ASSIGN_DTTM AS ROOM_ASSIGNED_DTTM,
        a.PHYS_ENTER_DTTM AS PROVIDERIN_DTTM,
        a.VISIT_END_DTTM,
        a.CHECKOUT_DTTM,
        a.TIME_IN_ROOM_MINUTES,
        a.CYCLE_TIME_MINUTES,
        a.VISIT_GROUP_NUM AS NEW_PT,
        a.LOS_NAME AS CLASS_PT,
        a.APPT_ENTRY_USER_NAME_WID AS APPT_SOURCE,
        a.ACCESS_CENTER_SCHEDULED_YN AS ACCESS_CENTER,
        a.VISIT_METHOD,
        a.VISIT_PROV_STAFF_RESOURCE_C AS RESOURCES,
        a.PRIMARY_DX_CODE,
        a.REFERRING_PROV_ID,
        a.PAT_ID,
        a.LOS_CODE,

        -- Date Calculations & Year Logic
        TO_CHAR(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.APPT_DTTM)) AS Appt_Year,
        TO_CHAR(a.APPT_DTTM, 'DY') AS APPT_DAY,
        TO_CHAR(a.APPT_DTTM, 'MON') AS Appt_Month,
        TO_CHAR(a.APPT_DTTM, 'yyyy-mm') AS Appt_Month_Year,
        TRUNC(a.APPT_DTTM) AS Appt_Date_Year,
        (a.APPT_DTTM - a.APPT_MADE_DTTM) AS Wait_Time,
        TRUNC(a.APPT_MADE_DTTM) AS APPT_MADE_DATE_YEAR,
        TO_CHAR(a.APPT_MADE_DTTM, 'yyyy-mm') AS Appt_Made_Month_Year,

        -- New Patient Logic
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.PRC_NAME, 'NEW') AS NEW_PT_SCHEDULED,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.LOS_NAME, 'NEW') AS NEW_PT_ARRIVED_RAW,

        -- Joined Table Fields
        b.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS DEPT_NAME_DNU,
        b.DEPARTMENT_ID,
        b.SITE,
        c.ASSOCIATIONLISTA,
        c.ASSOCIATIONLISTB,
        c.ASSOCIATIONLISTT,
        c.INPERSONVSTELE,
        d.DISEASE_GROUP,
        d.DISEASE_GROUP_B AS DISEASE_GROUP_DETAIL,
        d.PROVIDER_TYPE,
        e.DESCRIPTION as DX_DETAIL,
        REPLACE(e.DEFINITION, 'Oncology-', '') AS DX_GROUPER,
        i.RACE,
        i.MYCHART_STATUS,
        z.ETHNIC_BACKGROUND,

        -- Cleaned Provider Names
        TRIM(TRAILING FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(a.PROV_NAME_WID, '{{reg_exp}}', '')) AS Provider,
        TRIM(TRAILING FROM REGEXP_REPLACE(a.REFERRING_PROV_NAME_WID, '{{reg_exp}}', '')) AS Referring_Provider

    FROM MV_DM_PATIENT_ACCESS a
    INNER JOIN ONCOLOGY_DEPARTMENT_GROUPINGS b ON a.DEPARTMENT_ID = b.DEPARTMENT_ID
    LEFT JOIN ONCOLOGY_PRC_GROUPINGS c ON a.PRC_NAME = c.PRC_NAME
    LEFT JOIN ONCOLOGY_DISEASE_GROUPINGS d ON a.PROV_ID = d.EPIC_PROVIDER_ID
    LEFT JOIN VIZIENT2023_CANCER_GROUPER e ON a.PRIMARY_DX_CODE = e.EPIC_ICD10_CODE
    LEFT JOIN MV_PATIENT_SELECT_DEMOGRAPHICS i ON a.PAT_ID = i.PAT_ID
    LEFT JOIN ONCOLOGY_ETHNIC_BACKGROUND_PULL z ON a.PAT_ID = z.PAT_ID
    LEFT JOIN ONCOLOGY_LOS_EXCLUSIONS f ON a.LOS_CODE = f.LOS_CODE
    WHERE f.LOS_CODE IS NULL
      AND (
          a.CONTACT_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('{{date_1}} 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE('{{date_2}} 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
          OR
          a.APPT_MADE_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE('{{date_1}} 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE('{{date_2}} 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
      )
),

Deduplicated_Data AS (
    SELECT
        rd.*,
        j.RACE_GROUPER,
        j.RACE_GROUPER_DETAIL,
        p.MYCHART_STATUS_GROUPER,
        m.ETHNICITY_GROUPER,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY rd.MRN, rd.APPT_DTTM, rd.APPT_TYPE, rd.EPIC_PROVIDER_ID, rd.APPT_STATUS
            ORDER BY rd.MRN, rd.APPT_DTTM, rd.APPT_TYPE, rd.EPIC_PROVIDER_ID, rd.APPT_STATUS
        ) AS Row_Counts
    FROM Raw_Patient_Data rd
    LEFT JOIN ONCOLOGY_RACE_GROUPER j ON LOWER(rd.RACE) = LOWER(j.RACE)
    LEFT JOIN ONCOLOGY_MYCHART_STATUS_GROUPER p ON LOWER(rd.MYCHART_STATUS) = LOWER(p.MYCHART_STATUS)
    LEFT JOIN ONCOLOGY_ETHNICITY_GROUPER m ON LOWER(rd.ETHNIC_BACKGROUND) = LOWER(m.ETHNIC_BACKGROUND)
) SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN h.DEPT_NAME_DNU LIKE 'X_%'
             AND h.APPT_DTTM >= TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
             AND h.APPT_DTTM < TO_DATE('2025-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(h.DEPT_NAME_DNU, '^[X_]{2}', 'X_2024_')
        ELSE h.DEPT_NAME_DNU
    END AS DEPARTMENT_NAME,
    h.*,
    NVL(h.NEW_PT_ARRIVED_RAW, 'ESTABLISHED') AS NEW_PT_ARRIVED,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS totalRows
FROM Deduplicated_Data h
WHERE h.Row_Counts = 1;", 
.open = "{{", .close = "}}")

oncology_index <- glue("CREATE index oncology_filter_index on ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE  (SITE, DEPARTMENT_NAME, DX_GROUPER, APPT_DTTM, APPT_DAY)")
oncology_index_date <- glue("CREATE index oncology_filter_index_appt_dttm  on ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE  (APPT_DTTM, DEPARTMENT_NAME)")

#Implementing procedures 
update_columns_ethnicity <- glue("BEGIN fill_na('ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE', 'ETHNICITY_GROUPER',
                                 'ETHNIC_BACKGROUND', 'BLANK/UNKNOWN'); END;")

update_columns_race <- glue("BEGIN fill_na('ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE ', 'RACE', 'RACE', 'BLANK'); END;")

update_columns_race_grouper <- glue("BEGIN fill_na('ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE', 'RACE_GROUPER', 'RACE_GROUPER', 'BLANK/UNKNOWN'); END;")

update_columns_race_detail <- glue("BEGIN fill_na('ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE', 'RACE_GROUPER_DETAIL', 'RACE_GROUPER_DETAIL', 'BLANK/UNKNOWN'); END;")


update_columns_my_chart <- glue("BEGIN fill_na('ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE', 'MYCHART_STATUS_GROUPER', 'MYCHART_STATUS', 'Not Activated'); END;")

update_columns_ref_provider <- glue("BEGIN fill_na('ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE', 'REFERRING_PROVIDER', 'REFERRING_PROVIDER', 'Unknown/Blank'); END;")

update_columns_dx_grouper <- glue("BEGIN fill_na('ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE', 'DX_GROUPER', 'DX_GROUPER', 'Non-Cancer'); END;")

update_columns_dx_detail <- glue("BEGIN fill_na('ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE', 'DX_DETAIL', 'DX_DETAIL', 'Non-Cancer'); END;")

update_columns_new_pt_scheduled <- glue("BEGIN fill_na('ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE', 'NEW_PT_SCHEDULED', 'NEW_PT_SCHEDULED', 'ESTABLISHED'); END;")


update_genetics_infusion <- glue("UPDATE ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE
   SET ASSOCIATIONLISTA = 'Treatment',
   ASSOCIATIONLISTB = 'Treatment Visit',
   ASSOCIATIONLISTT = 'Genetic Infusion',
   INPERSONVSTELE = 'In Person'
 WHERE DEPARTMENT_ID =  '8458037'
")

oncology_filters_tbl <- glue("CREATE TABLE ONCOLOGY_FILTERS_UPDATED AS
SELECT DISTINCT SITE, DEPARTMENT_NAME, PROVIDER, PROVIDER_TYPE, DISEASE_GROUP, DISEASE_GROUP_DETAIL, INPERSONVSTELE, ASSOCIATIONLISTA, ASSOCIATIONLISTB, ASSOCIATIONLISTT, REFERRING_PROVIDER, REFERRING_PROV_ID, DX_GROUPER, APPT_STATUS FROM ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE")

oncology_filters_tbl_drop <- glue("DROP TABLE ONCOLOGY_FILTERS_UPDATED")

oncology_active_treatment_table_drop <- glue("DROP TABLE ONCOLOGY_ACTIVE_TREATMENT_MRN")

oncology_active_treatment_table <- glue ("CREATE TABLE ONCOLOGY_ACTIVE_TREATMENT_MRN AS
SELECT DISTINCT MRN FROM ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE WHERE APPT_STATUS = 'Arrived' AND ASSOCIATIONLISTA = 'Treatment'")

oncology_main_table <- glue("CREATE TABLE ONCOLOGY_ACCESS AS
                            SELECT a.*, b.ACTIVE_MRN FROM ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE a
                            LEFT JOIN ONCOLOGY_ACTIVE_MRN_MAPPING b
                            on a.MRN = b.MRN")

tryCatch({
conn <- poolCheckout(con)
dbBegin(conn)
if(dbExistsTable(conn, "ONCOLOGY_ACCESS_BASE")) {
        dbExecute(conn,drop_query)
  }
  dbExecute(conn,update_query)
  dbExecute(conn,oncology_index)
  dbExecute(conn,oncology_index_date)
  dbExecute(conn,update_columns_ethnicity)
  dbExecute(conn,update_columns_race_grouper)
  dbExecute(conn,update_columns_race_detail)
  dbExecute(conn,update_columns_race)
  dbExecute(conn,update_columns_my_chart)
  dbExecute(conn,update_columns_ref_provider)
  dbExecute(conn,update_columns_dx_grouper)
  dbExecute(conn,update_columns_dx_detail)
  dbExecute(conn,update_genetics_infusion)
  dbExecute(conn,update_columns_new_pt_scheduled)

if(dbExistsTable(conn, "ONCOLOGY_ACCESS")) {
        dbExecute(conn,"DROP TABLE ONCOLOGY_ACCESS")
}
  dbExecute(conn, oncology_main_table)


if(dbExistsTable(conn, "ONCOLOGY_ACTIVE_TREATMENT_MRN")) {
        dbExecute(conn,oncology_active_treatment_table_drop)
  }
  dbExecute(conn,oncology_active_treatment_table)

if(dbExistsTable(conn, "ONCOLOGY_FILTERS_UPDATED")) {
        dbExecute(conn,oncology_filters_tbl_drop)
  }
dbExecute(conn, oncology_filters_tbl)


  dbCommit(conn)
poolReturn(conn)
  
},
 error = function(err){
    print(err)
    dbRollback(conn)
    dbDisconnect(conn)
    poolReturn(conn)
})
print("pool")
```
